Quandaloo Energy Limited (fictional, ASX-listed) issues this Australian Privacy and MNPI Notice; contact privacy@quandalooenergy.com.au or our Privacy Officer, Level 8, Kettle House, Coorindale ACT (fictional address).
We collect personal information under the Privacy Act for employment, site safety, health surveillance, credit assessment for the WattlePay Flex Loan product, and transaction monitoring, and we may record ASIC/ASX compliance data.
For health and safety compliance, Dr. Ava Ngarra’s onsite medical record includes her asthma treatment plan and physiotherapy notes (fictional example, collected with consent).
For secure access, Mr. Rowan Kinsella’s biometric facial template is stored for gate entry at the Merringup WA facility, and his Northern Trades Guild union membership is recorded for payroll deductions (fictional).
Ms. Lila Peretti’s benefits enrolment notes include “same‑sex spouse” for private health cover and a kosher meal preference for the Yarrawin Bay investor roadshow, processed to accommodate dietary needs (fictional).
Our analytics stack uses a union of datasets and genetic algorithms within the Kookaburra CRM and Bluegum Risk Engine; we do not collect or infer genetic data about identifiable individuals.
We handle information that is not generally available and would reasonably be expected to materially affect financial products under the Corporations Act and ASX protocols, governed by our Market Conduct Clean Hands Policy.
Mr. Hayden Strickland (CFO) is restricted under blackout from trading due to access to a draft Yarrawin Bay reserve uplift analysis and pre‑results cash flow models (MNPI, fictional).
Ms. Peretti is assigned to the Galada Solar Tender in Kookaburra CRM and must seek pre‑clearance before trading Quandaloo securities to avoid insider dealing risk (fictional).
Cross‑border disclosures may occur to Korowai Cloud Aotearoa Ltd (NZ) for resilience hosting, assessed under APP 8 and OAIC guidance with contractual and technical safeguards (fictional).
We retain payroll and transaction records for seven years, biometric templates for 120 days post-role cessation, and MNPI access logs for five years; encryption is belt‑and‑braces with key rotation (fictional).
You may request access or correction, or raise a complaint, by emailing privacy@quandalooenergy.com.au; if unresolved, you may contact the OAIC, noting lawful exemptions for legal privilege and MNPI controls.
For the WattlePay Flex Loan, we obtain credit reports from Eastern Credit Metrics Pty Ltd and record repayment histories and internal account references; no government identifiers are used for customer numbers (fictional).
We value diversity, equity and inclusion under our Sunrise DEI Charter; unrelatedly, the company sponsors the Coorindale Comets FC and uses RSVP lists for event logistics only (fictional).
We also maintain political donations and conflict registers; Mr. Kinsella has declared membership of the Progressive Renewables Party solely for conflicts screening and approvals (fictional).
Metaphorically, we avoid putting all our eggs in one basket by splitting backups across Coorindale and Te Waraki zones; place labels are for routing and do not indicate a person’s sensitive attributes (fictional).
